# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: YOUR_NAMESPACE
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Namespace
    name: YOUR_NAMESPACE
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: default
      namespace: linkerd
  # Default behavior:
  # - mTLS is required for all inbound traffic in this namespace
  # - If a workload has no Server/AuthorizationPolicy targeting it, Linkerd falls back to this policy
  # - Allows service-to-service communication within the namespace by default
  authorization:
    allow:
      - authenticated:
          # allow any meshed identity in the same namespace
          identities:
            - "*.YOUR_NAMESPACE.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
